context.projectOverview: Sprint 2 of cockpit-integration. Adds three new MCP tools (bober_list_active_runs, bober_get_run_status, bober_abort_run) that surface the multi-run RunManager from Sprint 1 to MCP clients.

completedSprints.title: Multi-run RunManager with disk persistence and crash recovery
completedSprints.summary: Refactored singleton activeRun → Map<runId,RunState>. New methods: getRun, listActiveRuns, abortRun, load. Atomic temp+rename persistence to .bober/runs/<runId>/state.json. Crash recovery via load() flipping orphans → failed. Back-compat for bober_run/bober_status preserved. 1142 tests passing (+26).

context.criticalContext: RunManager now has getRun(runId), listActiveRuns(), abortRun(runId, reason). These three MCP tools are thin handlers that JSON-stringify the results. Pattern to follow: every existing tool at src/mcp/tools/<name>.ts. Schema lives in registerXxxTool. Handler returns JSON string. Error: throw new McpError(ErrorCode.InvalidRequest, '...').
